title: Ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: Ollama Python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list, and manage models with a simple API.

title: Ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: LangChain Ollama Integration
summary: Use any Ollama model as an LLM in LangChain with one line: Ollama(model='llama3').

title: LlamaIndex Ollama Integration
summary: Plug Ollama models into LlamaIndex for local RAG, agents, and document QA.

title: Ollama Web UI
summary: Feature-rich chat interface for Ollama (Docker-ready) inspired by ChatGPT UI.

title: Ollama Copilot
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: Ollama Sharp
summary: .NET/C# client for Ollama with async streaming and embeddings support.

title: Ollama Helm Chart
summary: Kubernetes Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models at scale.

title: Ollama Discord Bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: Ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions and Spring Boot starters.

title: Ollama Functions
summary: Experimental toolkit to expose OpenAI-style function-calling on top of Ollama models.

title: Ollama Embeddings Benchmark
summary: Repo with scripts to benchmark embedding speed & quality across Ollama models.

title: Ollama Reddit Community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, tips, and integrations around Ollama.

title: Ollama on Hacker News
summary: Discussion thread comparing Ollama to llama.cpp and local GPU inference options.

title: Ollama Ruby Gem
summary: Official Ruby client for Ollama; install via gem install ollama.

title: Ollama CLI Tools
summary: Collection of shell scripts to batch-pull, convert, and tag Ollama models.

title: Ollama Go Client
summary: Official Go client for Ollama with context cancellation and streaming support.

title: Ollama Docker Compose Examples
summary: Ready-made docker-compose stacks for Ollama + Open-WebUI, Postgres, Qdrant, etc.
